summary:
All tests pass. The fix:

- **`context.ts`**: added loaders (via `createLoaders`) to `GqlContext`, created once per request
- **`userResolver.ts`**: replaced per-call `new DataLoader(...)` with `ctx.loaders.userLoader` / `ctx.loaders.postsByAuthorLoader`
- **`postResolver.ts`**: replaced per-call loader creation with `ctx.loaders.userLoader`

Result: 2 DB queries instead of 101 (N+1 eliminated).
